characters.name: Big Man
characters.description: Big ManGenderMaleDate of birth40s (presumably)Age30sResides inNew Jersey, US (Season 1)Los Angeles, California (Season 2)OccupationBodyguard, rapperFamilyKiara (niece)FriendsKevin JonasJoe JonasNick JonasEnemiesDZ(sometimes)First seenKeeping it RealLast seenBand of Brothers Bigman3one6is JONAS' bodyguard and rapper. He moves into their LA apartment with them for the summer and looks out for them, askingDZto leave when he shows up at their house, if he doesn't have muffins. It is revealed inThe Secretthat not only does Bigman3one6 have a niece called Kiara, but he also takes tap dance classes. When the boys forgot Stella's birthday, they tried to use him as a shield but when he found out that was why they were hiding behind him he told them, they were on their own. Which suggest, like everyone else he is scared of Stella.

characters.name: DZ
characters.description: Dennis ZimmerFull nameDennis ZimmerNickname(s)DZGenderMaleDate of birth1993-1994Age16-17Resides inLos Angeles,CAEye colorBlueHair colorRed/Strawberry BlondeFamilyUnknownFriendsKevin,Joe,Nick,Stella,MacyEnemiesNonePortrayed byAdam Hicks DZis Jonas' neighbour, who comes over unannounced, and uninvited, and finds himself being thrown out byBig Man. He claims to have lots of Hollywood connections, encouraging the boys to throw a party (House Party), and offering to introduceMacyto Stone Stevens (Back to the Beach). He lives with his mom who goes to pilates classes. His real name is Dennis Zimmer, but he says only the haters call him that.

characters.name: Fiona Skye
characters.description: Fiona SkyeFull nameFiona SkyeNickname(s)Bertha SnirkisGenderFemaleAge16-17 (estimate)Resides inNew Jersey, USAOccupationActressEye colorGreenHair colorBlondeRomancesJoe Lucas(Ex-Boyfriend)FriendsPaolo (photographer)EnemiesJoe Lucas,Nick Lucas,Kevin Lucas,Stella Malone,Macy MisaFirst seen"Frantic Romantic"Portrayed bySara Paxton Fiona Skyeis a minor character. She only appears in a singular season one episode. She is a popular starlet who stalkedJoe Lucasand generally wants to use his band's fame to further her acting career. She is portrayed bySara Paxton. To be written.

characters.description: Franklin Hoss LucasFull nameFranklin Hoss LucasNickname(s)FranksterGenderMaleDate of birth2000-2001Age8 (Season 1)9 (Season 2)Resides inNew JerseyOccupationStudentEye colorBrownHair colorBrownFamilyTom Lucas(Father)Sandy Lucas(Mother)Kevin Lucas(Oldest Brother)Joe Lucas(Older Brother)Nick Lucas(Older Brother)Unnamed GrandmotherDebbie (aunt)Portrayed byFrankie Jonas Sandy Lucas(Mother)Kevin Lucas(Oldest Brother)Joe Lucas(Older Brother)Nick Lucas(Older Brother)Unnamed GrandmotherDebbie (aunt) Franklin Hoss "Frankie" Lucasis the youngest brother of the Jonas brothers.

characters.name: Joe Lucas
characters.description: Joe LucasFull nameJoseph Adam LucasNickname(s)JoeJoeypooGenderMaleDate of birthAugust 15, 1993Age16 (Season 1)17 (Season 2)Resides inNew Jersey, USA (formerly)Los Angeles, CaliforniaOccupationMusicianStudentEye colorBrownHair colorBlack/Dark BrownFamilyTom Lucas(father)Sandy Lucas(mother)Kevin Lucas(older brother)Nick Lucas(younger brother)Frankie Lucas(youngest brother)RomancesStella Malone(Girlfriend)Angelina (Ex-Girlfriend)Fiona Skye (Ex-Girlfriend)Vanessa Page(Ex-Girlfriend)Jessica (Fake Girlfriend)Maria (Short-Lived Crush)FriendsMacy MisaStella Malone(close friend)DZCarl "The Shoe" SchusterEnemiesVan Dyke Tosh (formerly)SchoolHorace Mantis AcademyAffiliationsJ.O.N.A.S.First seenWrong SongLast seenBand of BrothersPortrayed byJoe Jonas Joseph Adam "Joe" Lucasis one of the main protagonists of the series and one third of the band, JONAS. He’s the lead vocalist, frontman and the heartthrob/womanizer of the group. Joe may be hinted to have an innocent crush onStella Malone(he admitted that he put the pudding in her purse and earlier he told her that guys do mean things to girls they like), although he teases her. He and Stella think alike sometimes, such as inKeeping it Real. In Season Two, Joe is more focused on his acting career, auditioning for a part in a movie oppositeVanessa Page, and getting it. Joe is a charming, outgoing and sometimes impulsive teenager. Joe is also confident, humorous, and often the focus of attention, especially with his talent and charisma on stage. Although, he is a little conceited and can act like a prankster to his brothers. However, he does have instances of kindness in various scenarios. Although, he is a little conceited and can act like a prankster to his brothers. However, he does have instances of kindness in various scenarios.

characters.name: Kevin Lucas
characters.description: Kevin LucasFull nameKevin Percy LucasNickname(s)KevGenderMaleDate of birthNovember 5, 1992Age17 (Season 1)18 (Season 2)Resides inNew Jersey, USA (Season 1)Los Angeles, California (Season 2)OccupationSinger/GuitaristStudentEye colorHazelHair colorDark BrownFamilyTom Lucas(father)Sandy Lucas(mother)Joe Lucas(younger brother)Nick Lucas(second younger brother)Frankie Lucas(youngest brother)RomancesMaria (Short-Lived Crush)Anya/Kimmie (Ex-Girlfriend)Samantha (Crush)FriendsMacy MisaStella MaloneEnemiesDavid Henrie (formerly)SchoolHorace Mantis AcademyAffiliationsJ.O.N.A.S.First seenWrong SongLast seenBand of BrothersPortrayed byKevin Jonas Kevin Percy "Kev" Lucasis one of the main protagonists in the series and the oldest of the Lucas brothers, and also appears to be the most naive. He is often seen getting hurt along with his brothers when they're around Macy. His voice gets high-pitched when he lies to anyone, especially if the truth hurts someone else's feelings. In the second season, he’s more focused on directing than the band. Kevin is well-meaning and can be quite dim-witted at times. He often comes up with crazy ideas to try and get him and his brothers out of messy situations. He is a bit naïve, although being the eldest brother he is the youngest at heart. In season 2, he is an aspiring director and directs the band's video for a drive and gets chosen to direct David Henrie's new movie. Kevin has a love of guitars and owns many. He keeps them on a moving guitar rack. Kevin is well-meaning and can be quite dim-witted at times. He often comes up with crazy ideas to try and get him and his brothers out of messy situations. He is a bit naïve, although being the eldest brother he is the youngest at heart. In season 2, he is an aspiring director and directs the band's video for a drive and gets chosen to direct David Henrie's new movie. Kevin has a love of guitars and owns many. He keeps them on a moving guitar rack.

characters.name: Lisa Malone
characters.description: Lisa Malone Lisa MaloneisStella'saunt, who spends the summer withMacyand Stella in the Lucas Brothers' guest house. She moves into the guest house after speaking with Stella's mother about her relationship with Joe. She once dated a rockstar, and because the relationship ended badly, she doesn't trust rockstars anymore, which is why she tries to discourage Stella from dating Joe, and is angry about Nick and Macy dating. She wants to become a masseuse, and has toyed with the idea of being one for cats. The creation of the role of Lisa was after Disney's entertainment president, Gary Marsh, disliked the idea of the girls and the brothers living alone for the summer.

characters.name: Macy Misa
characters.description: Macy MisaSeason 2Season 1Full nameMacy Michelle MisaNickname(s)MaceGenderFemaleDate of birthc. 1992-1993 (estimated)Age16-17Resides inNew Jersey, USA (Season 1)Los Angeles, California (Season 2)OccupationStudentMisa's Pieces Employee (part-time)JONAS Website Editor/Publicist (unpaid)Eye colorHazel (Brown & Green)Hair colorBrownFamilyUnnamed motherUnnamed brothersRomancesNick Lucas(Boyfriend)Randolph(Ex-Boyfriend)FriendsJoe LucasKevin LucasNick Lucas(close friend)Stella Malone(best friend)SchoolHorace Mantis AcademyAffiliationsJ.O.N.A.S.First seenWrong SongLast seenBand of BrothersPortrayed byNicole AndersonMacy Michelle Misais a recurring supporting character in the series and a self-proclaimed number one JONAS "superfan". She attendsHorace Mantis Academywith the boys and her best friendStella. She runs a JONAS fan site and has to be best at everything in school. Her mother owns a thrift store, where she works part-time on some days, as revealed in "Keeping it Real". According to the JONAS video game, the store is called Misa's Pieces. Though not a lot else is known about her family, she mentions she's lived around boys for years, as she has brothers, which is revealed in "A Wasabi Story". Macy is a big fan of JONAS. She claims she doesn't have a favorite member of the band but likes them all for different things. For example, she likesNickbecause he smells like sugar-free cookies, andKevinbecause he 'smells like Heaven'. She runs a JONAS fan site, and is also the president of the JONAS fan club, where she brings in "Jonasabilia" for other fans to see, such as sandwich crusts, and toenail clippings. Though at the start of the season, she was unable to speak to the brothers without fainting, however she currently seems to be used to their presence and is considered one of their friends.Nicole Andersonhas stated in an interview that in Season 2, Macy becomes the band's publicist, and can be seen working on the band's website, and making video blogs. She runs a JONAS fan site and has to be best at everything in school. Her mother owns a thrift store, where she works part-time on some days, as revealed in "Keeping it Real". According to the JONAS video game, the store is called Misa's Pieces. Though at the start of the season, she was unable to speak to the brothers without fainting, however she currently seems to be used to their presence and is considered one of their friends.Nicole A

characters.name: Macy-Stella Friendship
characters.description: Stella:"Macy guess what?" Macy:"What?" Stella:"I love you! (hugs her)"

characters.name: Macy-Stella Friendship
characters.description: Stella:"Macy guess what?" Macy:"What?" Stella:"I love you! (hugs her)"

characters.name: Mona Klein
characters.description: Mona KleinGenderFemaleAge26-32Portrayed byDebi Mazar Mona Kleinis a Los Angeles movie director working on her comeback movie,Forever April. She is very hard on her cast, criticizing Joe when he is late, and telling him "get your act together or ya gonna see my dark side" and he replies "it gets darker?" ("And... Action!"). However, she is willing to adjust her work ethics in order to get the best out of her cast. Kevin admires her work, and wants to learn from her. She rarely calls people by their real names, for example, referring toStellaas "blondie".

characters.name: Nick Lucas
characters.description: Nick LucasFull nameNicholas LucasNickname(s)NickGenderMaleDate of birthSeptember 16, 1994Age15 (Season 1)16 (Season 2)Resides inNew Jersey, USA (Season 1)Los Angeles, California (Season 2)OccupationMusicianStudentEye colorBrownHair colorDark BrownFamilyTom Lucas(father)Sandy Lucas(mother)Joe Lucas(older brother)Kevin Lucas(oldest brother)Frankie Lucas(younger brother)RomancesMacy Misa(Girlfriend)Penny Ken(Ex-Girlfriend)Maria (Short-Lived Crush)FriendsMacy MisaStella MaloneDZEnemiesMantra (formerly)SchoolHorace Mantis AcademyAffiliationsJ.O.N.A.S.First seenWrong SongLast seenBand of BrothersPortrayed byNick Jonas Nicholas "Nick" Lucasis one-third of the band, JONAS. He plays drums, guitar, and sings along with Joe and rarely Kevin. He is also the band's songwriter. He could as Joe says "write a song before breakfast". He is known as the serious one, and rarely smiles, except when talking to a girl he's crushing on, Stella, Macy, and his brothers were surprised to see him smiling. It is also revealed in episode six that he is just "three points shy of a genius". He takes himself and his work very seriously, as when he failed an exam in "Exam Jam", he was very hard on himself that he could be the reason the band couldn't go on tour. He is the youngest and most mature of all three brothers. He also has a very intense personality, which is what makes him such a skilled musical artist, but his intensity also causes him emotional pain at times. Nick suffers from Type 1 Diabetes, much like Nick Jonas in real life. Nick is the serious one and most mature out of all his brothers. He is often jealous that Kevin gets to be the eldest as he says. He is known for falling in love too fast and his family makes fun of him for it. They say that he falls too fast, gets his heart broken, and the rest of the family have to pick up the pieces. He is currently dating Macy Misa. Nick is the serious one and most mature out of all his brothers. He is often jealous that Kevin gets to be the eldest as he says. He is currently dating Macy Misa.

characters.name: Nick Lucas
characters.description: Nick LucasFull nameNicholas LucasNickname(s)NickGenderMaleDate of birthSeptember 16, 1994Age15 (Season 1)16 (Season 2)Resides inNew Jersey, USA (Season 1)Los Angeles, California (Season 2)OccupationMusicianStudentEye colorBrownHair colorDark BrownFamilyTom Lucas(father)Sandy Lucas(mother)Joe Lucas(older brother)Kevin Lucas(oldest brother)Frankie Lucas(younger brother)RomancesMacy Misa(Girlfriend)Penny Ken(Ex-Girlfriend)Maria (Short-Lived Crush)FriendsMacy MisaStella MaloneDZEnemiesMantra (formerly)SchoolHorace Mantis AcademyAffiliationsJ.O.N.A.S.First seenWrong SongLast seenBand of BrothersPortrayed byNick Jonas Nicholas "Nick" Lucasis one-third of the band, JONAS. He plays drums, guitar, and sings along with Joe and rarely Kevin. He is also the band's songwriter. He could as Joe says "write a song before breakfast". He is known as the serious one, and rarely smiles, except when talking to a girl he's crushing on, Stella, Macy, and his brothers were surprised to see him smiling. It is also revealed in episode six that he is just "three points shy of a genius". He takes himself and his work very seriously, as when he failed an exam in "Exam Jam", he was very hard on himself that he could be the reason the band couldn't go on tour. He is the youngest and most mature of all three brothers. He also has a very intense personality, which is what makes him such a skilled musical artist, but his intensity also causes him emotional pain at times. Nick suffers from Type 1 Diabetes, much like Nick Jonas in real life. Nick is the serious one and most mature out of all his brothers. He is often jealous that Kevin gets to be the eldest as he says. He is known for falling in love too fast and his family makes fun of him for it. They say that he falls too fast, gets his heart broken, and the rest of the family have to pick up the pieces. He is currently dating Macy Misa. Nick is the serious one and most mature out of all his brothers. He is often jealous that Kevin gets to be the eldest as he says. He is known for falling in love too fast and his family makes fun of him for it. They say that he falls too fast, gets his heart broken, and the rest of the family have to pick up the pieces. He is currently dating Macy Misa.

He is currently dating Macy Misa.

characters.name: Penny Ken
characters.description: Penny Kenis a minor character who appears in "Wrong Song" asNick Lucas'slove interest for that episode. She is portrayed by Bridgit Mendler. At the beginning of the episode, we find out that Nick is falling fast and hard for Penny despite being warned to slow down by Kevin. Nick goes crazy trying to write a song for Penny, and performs for her "Give Love A Try". Penny misunderstands that Nick wrote the song about her and instead think that it is a song that he wrote for her to sing. Penny then invites Nick to watch her perform at CBDB's where Penny announces that she will be singing the song Nick wrote for her. Nick then is saddened to find out that she already has a boyfriend, after she dedicates the song to her boyfriend.

characters.name: Sandy Lucas
characters.description: Sandy LucasGenderFemaleFamilyKevin Lucas(son)Joe Lucas(son)Nick Lucas(son)Frankie Lucas(son)Tom Lucas(husband)RomancesTom Lucas(husband) Joe Lucas(son)Nick Lucas(son)Frankie Lucas(son)Tom Lucas(husband) Sandy Lucasis the mother of the Lucas brothers. She tries to keep the family level-headed, chastising the boys when they start using their fame for the perks, and calls a family meal. She's also very sentimental, getting upset at watching home movies.

characters.name: Stella Malone
characters.description: Stella MaloneSeason 2Season 1Full nameStella MaloneNickname(s)StellGenderFemaleDate of birthc. 1992-1993 (estimated)Age16-17Resides inNew Jersey, USA (Season 1)Los Angeles, California (Season 2)OccupationStudentJONAS StylistEye colorBrownHair colorBlondeFamilyUnnamed motherLisa Malone(aunt)RomancesJoe Lucas(boyfriend)Van Dyke Tosh(former crush)Ben (ex-boyfriend)FriendsJoe Lucas(close friend)Kevin LucasNick LucasMacy Misa(best friend)EnemiesFiona SkyeSchoolHorace Mantis AcademyAffiliationsJ.O.N.A.S.First seenWrong SongLast seenBand of BrothersPortrayed byChelsea Kane Stella Maloneis a longtime friend to the band members of JONAS and a recurring supporting character in the series. She believes fashion is the sixth sense and finds unique ways to personalize their school uniforms. She is the boy's stylist, creating the Stellavator in order to help the boys know what to wear. She also repairs their clothes when fans rip or destroy them, and designs their clothes for special occasions. She also gives the boys great advice, helps them in any way she can, and she makes sure that they do the right thing. Unlike Macy, Stella is very bad at sports, having to design/make Macy's Volleyball Team uniforms in order to pass her gym class. Stella is often supportive to her associates and steadfast with the boys. She is fashion-conscious due to her love of clothes and shares her talent in design with other people. She also cares deeply for her friends and family, including her aunt, trying to help them whenever she can. Plus, she is pragmatic, doesn't treat (Joe, Nick, and Kevin) like clients and has a sense of wisdom. However, she can act emotional sometimes, experiencing jealousy and other strong feelings. Despite that, Stella has loyalty since she will have their backs when push comes to shove. Stella is often supportive to her associates and steadfast with the boys. She is fashion-conscious due to her love of clothes and shares her talent in design with other people. She also cares deeply for her friends and family, including her aunt, trying to help them whenever she can. Despite that, Stella has loyalty since she will have their backs when push comes to shove.

characters.name: Tom Lucas
characters.description: Tom Lucas Tom Lucasis the father of the brothers in J.O.N.A.S. At times, it seems like he cares more about his job as the boys' manager than the boys themselves and he’s constantly trying to make his wife happy, like in the episode "The Ding You Do", where he’s seen and heard shouting nice things about women, like they’re intelligent and thoughtful. He doesn’t go to LA with his sons, however he does come for a visit in "Direct to Video".

characters.name: Van Dyke Tosh
characters.description: Van Dyke ToshGenderMalePortrayed byChuck Hittinger Van Dyke Toshgoes to the same school as the brothers, and has been on several dates withStella, much to the dislike ofJoe. He is not very bright at times, and is a jock. He andMacyappear to have a rivalry going on when they play against each other in sports. He is very dim witted. Van Dyke and Stella have gone out on several dates together, and appear to like each other. In Fashion Victim, she goes on a date to the movies with him instead of helping Joe with his Math homework. InThe Three Musketeers, Van Dyke takes over Joe's role in the school play, which means he has to kiss Stella, until Joe swings out onto the stage to hit Van Dyke. When he and Stella plan to go on a date in the episodeDouble Date, Joe interferes again, asking Macy out to make it a double date.

characters.name: Vanessa Page
characters.description: Vanessa PageGenderFemaleResides inLos Angeles, CaliforniaOccupationActressRomancesJoe Lucas(ex-boyfriend)First seenHouse PartyLast seenUp in the AirPortrayed byAbby Pivaronas Vanessa Pageis a famous Hollywood actress who appears in the fictitious teen show,Malibu High, and a minor antagonist of season 2. She is working on the movie,Forever April, about a ghost called April. She meetsJoewhile he is clothes shopping for when he meetsStella("House Party"). While Joe is trying on clothes, Vanessa answers his cell phone when Stella calls. In "Back to the Beach", she tells Joe that her director wants a Joe from Jonas type to play her love interest in the movie, and celebrates with him when he gets the part. She has a dog called Chakra. She claims she dates every male co-star from each of her movies and Joe and her would have broken up at the end of the movie. She was very mean to Stella in "A Wasabi Story" when she found out Joe and Stella had a history.
